chunks.title: Praise for God's Works
chunks.reason: The psalmist declares the goodness of giving thanks and rejoicing in Yahweh's deeds.

chunks.title: Contrast Between Wicked and Righteous
chunks.reason: The text contrasts the temporary flourishing of the wicked with God's eternal exaltation and the believer's victory.

chunks.title: Promise for the Righteous
chunks.reason: The passage concludes with a metaphor of flourishing trees and a declaration of God's uprightness.
